user.title: Connect JARVIS
user.description: Connect JARVIS to an LLM. Use a cloud provider's API key, OR leave the key blank and point to a local model (Ollama) — no cloud account needed.

data_description.api_key: Leave blank to use a local model. Cloud keys: Groq gsk_... / OpenAI sk-... / Gemini from Google AI Studio.
data_description.llm_base_url: For a local model, e.g. http://homeassistant.local:11434/v1 (Ollama). Leave blank if using a cloud key.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid Groq API key. Check console.groq.com for a valid key starting with gsk_...
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Groq API. Check your network and base URL.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs for details.
error.need_llm: Enter either a cloud API key or a local LLM URL. For a local model, leave the key blank and set the URL to your Ollama endpoint.

abort.already_configured: JARVIS is already configured. Use the Configure button to update settings.
abort.import_failed: Could not read jarvis_config.json. Check the addon logs.

data.use_hass_api: Enable home control (lights, climate, locks, etc.)
data.cast_announce: Use announce mode on Cast speakers
